title: Nursery Rhyme. DIX. Natural History.
content:
Four and twenty tailors went to kill a snail,
        The best man among them durst not touch her tail;
        She put out her horns like a little Kyloe cow,
        Run, tailors, run, or she'll kill you all e'en now.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DIX. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
